creator: milios@ccsys.com
text:
Created attachment 245179
shell transcript

Thank you for looking into this, Jan.

I don't really use Meson personally; only incidentally through ports (10% of my installed ports declare it a build dependency). I'm sorry I can't remember why I happened to be building meson-1.2.1 two days ago; installing py311-typing-extensions-4.8.0 allowed me to immediately move on.

I was able to reproduce the error message, attached. Maybe LIB_DEPENDS of devel/py-setuptools-rust (perhaps only for particular Python flavors) is the more correct place to declare the devel/py-typing-extensions dependency.

Let me know if I should provide you more information about my build environment; it has 2583 installed ports any of which might have tickled the configuration or building of Meson or one of its dependencies.
